title: snoRNA-host_analysis
author: Bergeron, Danny
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This workflow was developped to investigate and characterize the interactions, between snoRNAs and their host genes, found in RNA-RNA interaction datasets from PARIS (PMID: 27180905), LIGR-Seq (PMID: 27184080) and SPLASH (PMID: 27184079).
steps_raw: This workflow was developped to investigate and characterize the interactions, between snoRNAs and their host genes, found in RNA-RNA interaction datasets from PARIS (PMID: 27180905), LIGR-Seq (PMID: 27184080) and SPLASH (PMID: 27184079).
